headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: MGM Resorts (NYSE:MGM) Vs The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Casino Operator Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at consumer discretionary - casino operator stocks, starting with MGM Resorts (NYSE:MGM).
